infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to the camera to take photos, videos, and for video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to the photo library to select profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to the microphone for video calls and real-time voice conversations with Iko AI.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to take photos and videos for video calls.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your microphone for video calls and real-time voice conversations with Iko AI.
Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your microphone for real-time voice streaming with Iko AI assistant.
